description: Configure the 'Enterprise Cloud Adoption 2024' survey for integration with the 'TechSample Solutions' panel provider. Add a URL parameter named 'rid' and set the survey's End URL to 'https://api.techsample.com/complete?project=9982&rid={PASSTHRU:rid}' with auto-loading enabled. Create a quota named 'Screenout: Non-Decision Makers' for question Q01 that immediately terminates the survey with a limit of 0 if the answer is 'No'. This quota must be configured to auto-load the termination URL 'https://api.techsample.com/term?project=9982&rid={PASSTHRU:rid}'. Login with admin/Admin123!.
